title: Matched Savings
html:
Stub. Matched-savings programs — the participant saves $X, the program adds $kX (often 1:1 to 4:1 ratio), often capped, often tied to a "qualified asset" use (education, first home, small business). The asymmetric one-time-yield event is the appeal.

Yahir is mid-execution on a 3:1 match via his IDA as of 2026 01 09 ida account meta — $3K saved unlocks $9K matched, $12K total.

Related

  • ida individual development account — Yahir's vehicle
  • 529 college savings plan — adjacent tax-advantaged-savings instrument
  • bridge income strategies — the broader frame
